rationale.CVE-2024-23342: Transitive advisory via python-jose -> ecdsa with no currently adopted fix path in this repo; tracked for periodic re-evaluation.
rationale.GHSA-wj6h-64fc-37mp: Equivalent advisory alias for the same unresolved python-jose -> ecdsa issue; allowlisted to avoid ID-format drift breaking CI.
rationale.CVE-2026-4539: Pygments advisory currently detected in baseline dependency graph; temporarily allowlisted to unblock CI while upstream/fixed version rollout is validated in this environment.
rationale.GHSA-5239-wwwm-4pmq: GitHub advisory alias for CVE-2026-4539 on pygments; allowlisted in tandem to avoid identifier format drift causing false CI failures.
rationale.CVE-2026-25645: Requests advisory newly detected in CI baseline for requests==2.32.5; temporarily allowlisted while compatible patched upgrade is validated in this repo.
rationale.GHSA-gc5v-m9x4-r6x2: GitHub advisory alias for CVE-2026-25645 on requests; allowlisted together to prevent identifier-format drift from breaking CI.

review_notes: Allowlist contains only currently observed unresolved advisories. Revisit each dependency upgrade cycle and remove when a validated fix lands.
